title: pulicaria inuloides
intro: Pulicaria inuloides, also known as Egyptian fleabane, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the Mediterranean region and the Middle East. The medicinal properties of Pulicaria inuloides lie in its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Pulicaria inuloides is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be used as a topical application in the form of a salve or cream.
